positive: A whimsical, stylized forest scene featuring bioluminescent glowing mushrooms and floating fairy lights against a deep midnight blue sky. A friendly, minimalist woodland animal silhouette (like a fox or bunny) sits at the center, looking up at the glowing flora. The style should be 'celestial watercolor with clean ink outlines,' utilizing high contrast between the luminous glowing elements (neon teal, magenta, sapphire blue) and the deep background. Composition must be circular and balanced, with strong negative space for typography. Cinematic studio lighting, volumetric fog, perfectly clean edges, vector illustration quality, suitable for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blur, artifacts, low resolution, grain, watermark, text, blurry, ugly, cropped, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, low detail, muted colors
